message:
test(proptest): add 14 property tests for BRAVO contention policy and AMAC batch executor (bd-3ar8v.4.46)

Add proptest-based property tests to two more Phase 3 modules:
- hostcall_queue (BRAVO): 7 tests (classify determinism, ratio bounds, counter monotonicity, mode validity, initial state)
- hostcall_amac: 7 tests (stall ratio bounds, stall/call counts, window capacity, interleave width bounds and monotonicity, group key stability)

Also includes concurrent agent fix for auth_oauth_refresh_race_condition_vcr test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
